name: Metaswarm Orchestrator - Feature Development
description: Full 7-phase lifecycle for implementing a new feature from issue to merged PR

inputs.issueDescription: Implement user authentication with OAuth2 and session management including refresh token rotation

phases: research-planning (Researcher explores codebase, Architect creates plan)
plan-review-gate (3 adversarial reviewers: feasibility, completeness, scope)
design-review-gate (6 parallel specialists, all must approve)
